name: AdvanSix Inc.
summary: AdvanSix Inc. is an integrated chemistry company operating five U.S.-based manufacturing facilities. It produces Nylon 6 resin (Aegis brand), caprolactam, ammonium sulfate fertilizer, acetone, phenol, alpha-methylstyrene, cyclohexanone, oximes, cyclohexanol, alkyl-amines and specialty amines. Products serve building and construction, fertilizers, agrochemicals, plastics, solvents, packaging, paints, coatings, adhesives, electronics, automotive, water treatment and pharmaceutical end markets. The company was spun off from Honeywell in 2016 and reported $1.522 billion in sales for 2025.

products.name: Aegis Nylon 6 Resin
products.description: Polymer resin used to produce fibers, filaments, engineered plastics and films for carpets, automotive, apparel and packaging.

products.name: Caprolactam
products.description: Key monomer for Nylon 6 production; sold to customers making polymer resins, fibers and nylon products.

products.name: Ammonium Sulfate Fertilizer
products.description: Nitrogen and sulfur fertilizer derived from integrated Hopewell operations; sold to distributors and farm cooperatives in North and South America.

products.name: Acetone
products.description: Chemical intermediate used in solvents, paints, coatings, adhesives, resins and herbicides; approximately $222 million in 2025 sales.

products.name: Phenol
products.description: Chemical intermediate produced at Frankford, Pennsylvania; majority further processed internally at Hopewell.

products.name: Alpha-Methylstyrene (AMS)
products.description: Chemical intermediate produced as part of the integrated manufacturing process at Frankford.

products.name: Cyclohexanone
products.description: Chemical intermediate manufactured and sold as part of the chemical intermediates product line.

products.name: Cyclohexanol
products.description: Chemical intermediate manufactured and sold as part of the chemical intermediates product line.

products.name: Alkyl-Amines and Specialty Amines
products.description: Manufactured at Bucks, Alabama and Portsmouth, Virginia facilities for agrochemical, water treatment and pharmaceutical intermediates markets.

products.name: Sulfuric Acid / Oleum
products.description: Produced as part of integrated Hopewell operations; excess sold externally.

products.name: Ammonia
products.description: Produced as part of integrated Hopewell operations; excess sold externally.

products.name: Carbon Dioxide
products.description: Produced as part of integrated Hopewell operations; excess sold externally.
